properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Precious memories, unseen angels, Sent from somewhere to my soul; How they linger, ever near me, And the sacred past unfold.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Precious memories, how they linger, How they ever flood my soul; In the stillness of the midnight, Precious, sacred scenes unfold.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Precious father, loving mother, Fly across the lonely years; And old home scenes of my childhood, In fond memory appear.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: In the stillness of the midnight, Echoes from the past I hear; Old-time singing, gladness bringing, From that lovely land somewhere.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: As I travel on life’s pathway, Know not what the years may hold; As I ponder, hope grows fonder, Precious memories flood my soul.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Precious memories of the prophet, Flood my soul from day to day, I remember scenes so precious That can never pass away.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I’ve heard the Message and Its signal That day’s end is near at hand, But I remember that He promised He’d return for those who’d stand.

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Precious memories, glorious meetings Across this land from sea to sea Where I heard the prophet’s Message That brought Life and hope to me.

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Precious memories in this storehouse Where the Food was laid away, We’ve returned to where he stored It, Spiritual Food against this day.
